q2: If a Founder Holder or Major Investor proposes to transfer more than 10%...
Section 6 uses "Founder Holder" but the agreement defines only "Founder Stockholders" and "Major Investor"; "Founder Holder" is neither a defined term nor a consistent usage with the defined party.
Section 6 uses "Founder Holder" but the Definitions section defines only "Founder Stockholders"; no definition of "Founder Holder" appears anywhere.
